title: Default Benchmark Agent Config
description: Adapter-backed config for the benchmark's default-agent path. The current adapter contract is OpenAI-compatible chat completions.

mode.description: Runtime interaction mode for the benchmark harness.

adapter.description: Transport adapter contract used by the benchmark agent path.

base_url.description: Pinned OpenAI-compatible API base URL, for example https://agent-backend.thomas.md/v1.

base_url_env.description: Environment variable that provides the OpenAI-compatible API base URL when base_url is not pinned.

model.description: Pinned model identifier passed to chat completions, for example builtin/fast.

model_env.description: Environment variable that provides the model identifier when model is not pinned.

api_key.description: Pinned bearer token for the OpenAI-compatible backend. Prefer api_key_env for reusable local configs.

api_key_env.description: Environment variable that provides the bearer token for the OpenAI-compatible backend.

chat_completions_path.description: Path appended to base_url for chat completions requests.

models_path.description: Path appended to base_url for model discovery and probe requests.

attempts.description: Maximum number of harness-managed model attempts for one task run.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of tool calls allowed during one interactive task run.

assistant_turns_per_attempt.description: Maximum number of assistant/tool exchanges allowed before the harness evaluates the current interactive proof as one submission attempt.

header_envs.description: Optional extra HTTP headers resolved from environment variables for proxy-specific routing or auth.

extra_body.description: Optional JSON body merged into every chat-completions request.

command.description: Non-shell command argv used by the command adapter protocol.

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for both model probe and chat-completions requests.
